Title: MTV Birthday Cake
Content: This MTV birthday cake is tasty and beautiful. It has 4 square layers decorated with pink, black and gold fondant. It is topped with the iconic MTV logo as a cake topper. Once to try this you'll never go back!

Content: Mason's 1st birthday cake was extravagant! The Disney World inspired custom cake is decorated and designed to look like Cinderella's Castle. Created with fondant, the Disney custom cake also shows the characters from some of the most iconic Disney movies of all time like Mickey Mouse, The Lion King, Snow White, Peter Pan and more!

Content: The perfect gender reveal cake for a small party! This gender reveal cake was designed with pink and blue color for a girl or a boy. The cake is styled as a drip cake with pink and blue icing and buttercream flowers. The cake is topped with fondant sculpting shoes for a baby girl or baby boy.

Title: Little Prince Baby Shower Cake
Content: This impressive baby shower cake for a boy has three mixed layers. The Little Prince Baby Shower Cake has baby blue and white fondant decorated layers with a middle layer of silver sprinkles. The baby shower cake is topped with a fondant sculpted elephant.

Title: Mickey & Minnie Birthday Cakes
Content: The perfect cake for any boy or girl that loves Disney! Both the Mickey Mouse Cake and the Minnie Mouse Cake are made of two round layers and decorated with fondant on the Disney cakes. Bring the magic of Disney to any birthday party, baby shower, or children's event.

Title: Spooky Halloween Birthday Cake
Content: The Spooky Halloween Birthday Cake is a great addition to any Halloween party or Halloween themed birthday party. The three layer cake has round layers of chocolate fondant. The Halloween birthday cake is decorated with icing as cobwebs to add some extra spookiness!

Title: LOL Birthday Cake
Content: The one layer LOL Birthday Cake is decorated with fondant and edible paper. The birthday cake is topped with a fondant bow.

Title: Gia's 18th Birthday Cake
Content: This three layer birthday cake was made Teresa Giudice's daughter Gia for her 18th birthday. The top and bottom round layers were decorated with purple fondant and edible stars. The middle layer was decorated with edible sparkles on buttercream.

Title: Legos Birthday Cake
Content: Mason's 6th birthday cake was designed with two mixed layers. Both layers were decorated with fondant and the top layer has a custom cake topper. Lego characters were added to pull the theme of the cake together.

Title: Hudson Mod & Dewars Cake
Content: The four layer cake was created for Hudson Magazine and Dewars. The layers are made of fondant and ribbons on each layer.

Title: Seventh Heaven Wedding Cake
Content: This 7-layer wedding cake is truly remarkable. Each layer has its own theme and decoration with buttercream and fondant. The white wedding cake is adorned with edible jewels. The kicker is the two fondant sculpted dogs on each side!

Title: Dream Castle Wedding Cake
Content: This masterpiece wedding cake has 9 layers that were expertly decorated. The expertly designed wedding cake has a 4 layer arch where you can see under the wedding cake. Buttercream and fondant are mixed to create the different layers along with floral accents.

Title: Batman Birthday Cake
Content: Giovanni's 3rd birthday cake was spectacular! The batman birthday cake was 3 layers of buttercream with a smoke gray airbrush design. The batman logo on the batman birthday cake was made of fondant.

Title: Exquisite Wedding Cake
Content: This creation is a very modern wedding cake, that features beautiful piping coming out of the corners and trimmed with satin ribbon. Your special day will be timeless with this design. Title: Bunnys and Bears Baby Shower Cake
Content: April's baby shower cake is 3 layers and decorated with fondant pastels and flower and butterfly accents. Custom baby bears and bunnies also adorn the cake for a whimsical feel.

Title: Pure White Baby Shower Cake
Content: The cake is made with simple white fondant and a sculpting baby carriage. The 2 layer baby shower cake is also perfect for any baby celebration.

Title: Chic Gold Baby Shower Cake
Content: Give your baby shower a modern twist with this 2 layer baby shower cake that is made with gold and white fondant layers and gold flakes adorning the top layer. The gold baby shower cake has a burgundy gum paste flower for a special touch.

Title: Magnificent Baby Gender Reveal Cake
Content: Truly a masterpiece that only Palermo Bakery can create, this 3 layer baby gender reveal cake is made for a large party of guests. The bottom layer is decorated for a boy with blue and gold fondant. The middle layer of the baby gender reveal cake is a 50/50 of pink and blue tie dye for a boy or a girl and the top layer for a girl. The cake is topped with a crown to anoint the new little prince or princess into the world!

Title: Dr. Seuss Baby Shower Cake
Content: A baby shower cake doesn't come more custom than this Dr. Seuss baby shower cake. The Dr. Seuss cake has 5 very different fondant layers from the open book base layer to the Dr. Seuss fish bowl layer on top.

Title: Winter Forest Baby Shower Cake
Content: The Winter Forest Baby Shower Cake is adorned with forest creatures on top of the semi-naked style cake. The baby shower cake is perfect for a small gathering to meet a Winter themed baby shower.

Title: Overalls Baby Shower Cake
Content: Celebrate your expected baby's birth with this baby shower cake. The custom baby shower cake is also great for a birthday as well. The 3 layers of fondant portray and baby with overalls and a mustache!

Title: Elephants Gender Reveal Cake
Content: This single layer Elephants Gender Reveal Cake is perfect for your small gathering to cut and see if you're having a baby boy or baby girl! The layer has ombré blues and pinks with fondant decorations and baby elephants.

Title: Timeless Bridal Shower Cake
Content: What an elegant 3 layer bridal shower cake with a timeless tea party theme. The mixed fondant cake layers and decorations play off of Alice in Wonderland. Florals are used to bring a pop to the timeless Alice in Wonderland bridal shower cake.

Title: Naked Roses Religious Cake
Content: This 2 layer semi-naked cake is perfect for any religious occasion and small gathering. Communion cakes, confirmation cakes and baptism cakes are a specialty of Palermo Bakery.

Title: Gold Baptism Cake
Content: This 2 layer mixed layer baptism cake is perfect for any religious occasion and small gathering. The layers are mixed buttercream with spatula spirals and fondant. Communion cakes, confirmation cakes and baptism cakes are a specialty of Palermo Bakery.

Title: Superhero Bar Mitzvah Cake
Content: Andrew's Bar Mitzvah was extra special with this 3 layer superhero cake. The Bar Mitzvah cake had mixed layers of fondant and decorated with his favorite superheroes.

Title: Angelic Communion Cake
Content: This religious and angelic Communion cake was created with elegance in mind. The 3 layers of fondant have different decorations and accented with gum paste florals and a cross cake topper.

Title: Wedding Dress Bridal Shower Cake
Content: Designed for the bride to be; this wedding dress bridal shower cake is 3 layers of fondant and adorned with florals.

Title: Strawberries Bridal Shower Cake
Content: This elegant style fondant bridal shower cake is adorned with florals and strawberries for the bride to be. The cake has a tall second layer to model a cathedral in light green fondant.

Title: Spectacular Pearls Graduation Cake
Content: Celebrate your recent graduate with this elegant graduation cake. This showcase graduation has mixed layers of expertly decorated styles including gold sprinkles and pearl. The top layer shows a graduation cap and gum paste roses.

Title: Doctorate Graduation Cake
Content: Celebrate your recent graduation as a doctor, nurse or any healthcare worker with this medical graduation cake. This graduation cake has 2 layers of fondant decorated to show your recent graduation into the medical field.

Title: Rockstar Mazel Tov Cake
Content: The perfect cake for any Judaism occasion like a Bar or Bat Mitzvah. The Rockstar Mazel Tov Cake is a musician's dream with an electric guitar sculpted out of fondant.

Title: Simple Gold Religious Cake
Content: This 1 layer baptism cake is perfect for any religious occasion and small gathering. The gold and white baptism cake is accented with gold flowers. Communion cakes, confirmation cakes and baptism cakes are a specialty of Palermo Bakery.

Title: Shades of Pink Wedding Cake
Content: Shades of Pink Wedding Cake is a two layer buttercream wedding cake expertly decorated with draping pink flowers.

Title: Naked Berries Wedding Cake
Content: Naked Berries Wedding Cake has 4 layers of buttercream with a semi-naked style. The rustic wedding cake is topped with two love birds and mixed berries.

Title: Royal Roses Wedding Cake
Content: The Royal Roses Wedding Cake is 4 layers of white buttercream with accents. The wedding cake has beautiful draping fondant pink roses.

Title: Autumn Florals Wedding Cake
Content: This 4 layer mixed wedding cake is perfect for any Fall wedding. The bottom layer of the floral wedding cake has buttercream spirals piped and small dots separating layers.

Title: Elegant Fall Wedding Cake
Content:
This Elegant Fall Wedding Cake is 4 layers of buttercream with a rustic design. Flowers are adorned to the rustic wedding cake.

Title: Regal Cream Wedding Cake
Content: The Regal Cream Wedding Cake is a masterpiece of cake decorating with 6 layers of buttercream and accents. The wedding cake was the centerpiece of the wedding.

Title: Gold Flaked Naked Wedding Cake
Content: The semi naked wedding cake has 3 round layers and another square layer. The naked wedding cake is adorned with roses and gold flakes.

Title: Corpse Bride Wedding Cake
Content: A wedding cake for a couple that loves the Corpse Bride movie, the 4 layer cake is made with white buttercream. The wedding cake layers are decorated with chocolate drips on each layer. The Corpse Bride Wedding Cake is topped with Victor Van Dort and Emily the Corpse Bride.

Title: Bling Roses Wedding Cake
Content: Bling Roses Wedding Cake is 6 layers of cake decorating perfection. Each layer of the wedding cake has a different theme from roses to jewelry. This bling style wedding cake will truly bring the elegance to any wedding.

Title: Pin-dot Squares Wedding Cake
Content: Pindot Squares Wedding Cake has 3 square layers adorned with pin-dots and and roses.

Title: Delicate Bronze Wedding Cake
Content: Delicate Bronze Wedding Cake showcases 3 layers with different cake decorating styles. The bottom layer of the wedding cake is bronze with carved art. The middle layer has crystal sprinkles and the top layer with horizontal piping.

Title: Marble Wow Wedding Cake
Content: Marble Wow Wedding Cake is a custom wedding cake that is truly one of a kind. Shades of gray marbling decorate the layers of the wedding cake and it is adorned with flowers. Each layer is taller than typical wedding cake layers.

Title: Chick-Fil-A Birthday Cake
Content: Chick-Fil-A Birthday Cake is the perfect cake for any Chick-Fil-A lover. The cake is decorated with fondant to show the black and white spots of the cow and logo.

Content: Peace & Love Birthday Cake is the perfect birthday cake for any occasion. The 3 layer cake is expertly decorated for a children's birthday cake with fondant decor.

Title: Toy Story Birthday Cake
Content: Toy Story Birthday Cake is a perfect children's birthday cake for any Toy Story or Pixar lover. The cake is decorated with fondant to show Buzz Lightyear and Woody.

Title: Tuxedo Birthday Cake
Content: Tuxedo Birthday Cake is perfect for any birthday or even as a groom's cake. The birthday cake is 1 layer that is decorated with fondant to look like a tuxedo.

Title: Harry Potter Birthday Cake
Content: Harry Potter Birthday Cake will make any fan love their birthday. The Harry Potter Birthday Cake is decorated with fondant to look like the iconic character.

Title: Seashore Splash Birthday Cake
Content: Gabriella's 12th birthday party was a huge success due in large part to the Seashore Splash Birthday Cake. The Seashore Splash Birthday Cake is a marvel of cake decorating with 4 different layers with bright colors of fondant.

Content: This elegant graduation cake is topped with a sculpted cap and a fondant scarf.
